taskAnswer1:
x = tf.constant([5, 2, 20, 15, 32, 100])
new_x = tf.where(
  tf.boolean_mask(x, x % 5 == 0) % 10 != 0,
  tf.square(tf.boolean_mask(x, x % 5 == 0)),
  tf.boolean_mask(x, x % 5 == 0)
)
print(new_x)
taskAnswer2:
x = tf.constant([4, 12, 8, 8])
new_x = tf.squeeze(
  tf.nn.conv1d(
    tf.reshape(x, [1, int(x.shape[0]), 1]),
    tf.constant([[[2]], [[1]]]),
    1,
    'VALID'
  )
)
print(new_x)
taskAnswer3:

  [101, 102, 103],
  [11, 12, 13]]
)

    axis=1
  )
)
print(new_x)

x = tf.constant([4, 12, 8, 8])
x1 = tf.squeeze(
  tf.nn.conv1d(
    tf.reshape(x, [1, int(x.shape[0]), 1]),
    tf.constant([[[2]], [[0]], [[0]]]) + tf.constant([[[0]], [[1]], [[0]]]),
    2,
    'VALID'
  )
)
x2 = tf.squeeze(
  tf.nn.conv1d(
    tf.reshape(x, [1, int(x.shape[0]), 1]),
    tf.constant([[[0]], [[2]], [[0]]]) + tf.constant([[[0]], [[0]], [[1]]]),
    2,
    'VALID'
  )
)
x3 = tf.squeeze(
  tf.nn.conv1d(
    tf.reshape(x, [1, int(x.shape[0]), 1]),
    tf.constant([[[0]], [[0]], [[2]]]) + tf.constant([[[2]], [[0]], [[0]]]),
    2,
    'VALID'
  )
)
x0 = tf.keras.ops.append(x1, x2, axis=None)
new_x = tf.keras.ops.append(x0, x3, axis=None)
print(new_x)

where_result = []
for where_i in range(len([n for n in x if ((n % 2) == 0)])):
